name: Smart Video Search (AI Powered)
desc: A modern video streaming application inspired by YouTube and Hotstar with AI-powered recommendations, intelligent search, API-based movie browsing, reusable React components, and optimized performance.

name: E-Commerce Web Application
desc: A scalable full-stack e-commerce platform built using the MERN stack. Features secure JWT authentication, dynamic shopping cart, Redux state management, REST APIs, responsive UI with Tailwind CSS, product management.

name: AI-Based Object Detection System
desc: An AI-powered computer vision application capable of detecting and analyzing objects in images and video streams using deep learning models. Includes preprocessing, real-time detection, and practical applications in automation and surveillance.

name: Meme Generator
desc: A  meme generator Platform built using the MERN stack. Features  customizable text, image upload, real-time preview, meme templates, secure backend APIs, responsive UI with Tailwind CSS, and seamless meme creation and sharing.
